problem: Chronic musculoskeletal (MSK) pain affects millions of people, leading to reduced mobility, opioid dependency, and costly surgeries. Traditional physical therapy is often inaccessible, expensive, and inconsistent.
solution: Digital MSK platform combining guided exercise sessions with 3D motion tracking, dedicated care teams (physical therapists, health coaches, orthopedic specialists), personalized programs, and FDA-cleared Enso device for drug-free pain relief using patented waveforms.
